public_reputation: Turned cathedral kitchens and cloth houses into refuge networks when the roads failed.
appearance: Elegant devotional fabrics, color-conscious ritual detail, and carefully arranged offerings tie reverence to presentation.
manner: Balances comfort with correction, sounding gentle until rite, taboo, or consequence is threatened. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a clerics still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of clerics in and around Shelkopolis, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis workable through the obligations of clerics while managing the immediate pressure of glyph corruption beyond the city in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must keep sacred procedure credible while grief, fear, or opportunism press for shortcuts. Around Shelkopolis, that usually means carrying glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry without letting the role of clerics visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Mother Eliane Threadmercy may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.
Any alliance with Mother Eliane Threadmercy can expose the party to taboo, doctrine, or institutional expectation centered on Shelkopolis.
Mother Eliane Threadmercy needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Shelkopolis.
Mother Eliane Threadmercy needs help with a problem in Shelkopolis that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Mother Eliane Threadmercy immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Shelkopolis, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Shelk nobility, Roadwardens Order.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shelkopolis: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
